historydata v0.2.9001
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Naval encounters during the Quasi War between France and the United States of America

Source: R/quasi-war.R
quasi_war.Rd

Naval encounters during the Quasi War between France and the United States of America

quasi_war

Format

A data frame with 198 observations of 16 variables.

References

This data was gathered by Abby Mullen.

Examples

head(quasi_war)

#> # A tibble: 6 x 16
#>   date       ship_1_name   ship_1_type        ship_1_nationali… ship_2_name     
#>   <date>     <chr>         <chr>              <chr>             <chr>           
#> 1 1798-09-28 America       armed merchant sh… USA               "privateer"     
#> 2 1798-07-11 American      armed merchant sh… USA               "3 privateers"  
#> 3 1798-09-27 Amphitrite    armed merchant sh… USA               "ship  "        
#> 4 1798-05-09 Belvedere     armed merchant sh… USA               "privateer sloo…
#> 5 1798-04-22 Boston Packet armed brig         USA               "2 brigand boat…
#> 6 1798-12-28 Camilla       armed merchant sh… USA               "2 privateers"  
#> # … with 11 more variables: ship_2_nationality <chr>, location <chr>,
#> #   lat <dbl>, long <dbl>, outcome <chr>, source <chr>, engagement_type <chr>,
#> #   status <chr>, year <dbl>, month <dbl>, day <int>
